name: Provacateur
description:
The Provacateur is a Maliwan SMG variant that always rolls with a fixed-element Maliwan barrel. This setup gives it above-average elemental chance and damage over time, boosted further if it also spawns with a Maliwan grip.

Although it is not a high-rarity drop, its strong status effects can carry you well until you replace it with a rarer or better-suited gun.
notes:
Related Maliwan fixed-element SMGs include Venom (corrosive), Vexation (shock), Revenant (slag), and Hyperborean (cryo).

A loot generation bug can cause blue-rarity versions to display purple-style item card title colouring. With Colourblind Mode enabled, it may label them as [Purple] instead of [Blue].

Because of this, blue and purple versions with identical parts can end up with the same stats.

Drops randomly from any appropriate loot source.
